summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Dashboard Tools menu and Empfehlungen routing. All 7 tool routes render correctly with DashboardToolWrapper headers. Tools dropdown expand/collapse works. Active state highlighting works correctly. Theme switching works on tool pages. Empfehlungen page shows 4 recommendation cards.
passed_tests: Dashboard Overview loads correctly with title 'Automotive Dashboard' - PASS
Tools dropdown toggle button visible with badge showing '7' - PASS
Tools dropdown expands when clicking toggle button - PASS
Tools dropdown collapses when clicking toggle button again - PASS
Tools dropdown toggle works bidirectionally - PASS
/dashboard/tools/deal-analyzer renders with correct title 'Deal Analyzer' - PASS
/dashboard/tools/roi-rechner renders with correct title 'ROI Rechner' - PASS
/dashboard/tools/marktwert renders with correct title 'Marktwert-Check' - PASS
/dashboard/tools/deal-quiz renders with correct title 'Deal Quiz' - PASS
/dashboard/tools/vorher-nachher renders with correct title 'Vorher / Nachher' - PASS
/dashboard/tools/radar renders with correct title 'Wettbewerb-Radar' - PASS
/dashboard/tools/heatmap renders with correct title 'Markt-Heatmap' - PASS
Each tool page shows DashboardToolWrapper header with icon and description - PASS
Each tool page contains landing component content inside dark container - PASS
/dashboard/empfehlungen renders DashboardEmpfehlungen component - PASS
Empfehlungen page shows 4 recommendation cards with vehicle info - PASS
Sidebar 'Empfehlungen' link navigates correctly to /dashboard/empfehlungen - PASS
Active state highlighting works - ROI Rechner shows #CCFF00 background when active - PASS
Active state highlighting updates correctly when navigating between tools - PASS
Inactive tool links show transparent background - PASS
Light theme applies correctly on tool pages - PASS
Gradient theme applies correctly on tool pages - PASS
Dark theme applies correctly on tool pages - PASS
Dashboard overview (/dashboard) still works correctly after tool navigation - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardToolWrapper correctly forces dark container (#0a0a0a) for landing components
toolNav array in DashboardSidebar.jsx properly defines all 7 tools with correct routes and colors
AnimatePresence used for smooth expand/collapse animation on Tools dropdown
Active state highlighting uses inline styles with item.color for proper theming
DashboardEmpfehlungen uses themeUtils for consistent styling across themes
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Tools menu fully implemented and tested. 7 tools available: Deal Analyzer, ROI Rechner, Marktwert-Check, Deal Quiz, Vorher/Nachher, Wettbewerb-Radar, Markt-Heatmap. All routes under /dashboard/tools/*. Empfehlungen page at /dashboard/empfehlungen shows 4 AI-generated tuning recommendation cards. Tools dropdown uses AnimatePresence for animations. Active tool links highlighted with their accent color (#00E5FF or #CCFF00). Theme switching (dark/light/gradient) works on all pages.
